creator: dickey@invisible-island.net
text:
I see (an extra blank).  I'll update that the next time I do maintenance.

FreeBSD's cgi is about 4 years out of date (see the bottom left of that
page versus my website), so I don't know how long it will take for a
change to appear here.

https://invisible-island.net/dialog/manpage/dialog_lib.html#h2-SEE-ALSO
